ns0:entry.ns0:title: GDQuest/learn-gdscript
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GDQuest/learn-gdscript
Language: gdscript
Learn Godot's GDScript programming language from zero, right in your browser, for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KsanaDock/Microverse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KsanaDock/Microverse
Language: gdscript
A god-simulation sandbox game built on Godot 4 as a multi-agent AI social simulation system. In this virtual world, AI characters possess independent thinking and memory, capable of autonomous social interactions, task completion, and developing complex social relationships through continuous communication.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MewPurPur/GodSVG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MewPurPur/GodSVG
Language: gdscript
A vector graphics application for structured SVG editing, available on all major desktop platforms and on web. Currently in late alpha.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-Industry-Project/Open-Industry-Project
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-Industry-Project/Open-Industry-Project
Language: gdscript
Free and Open-source warehouse/manufacturing development framework and simulator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
Language: gdscript
Unleash your creativity with Pixelorama, a powerful and accessible open-source pixel art multitool. Whether you want to create sprites, tiles, animations, or just express yourself in the language of pixel art, this software will realize your pixel-perfect dreams with a vast toolbox of features. Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitbrain/beehave
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitbrain/beehave
Language: gdscript
🐝 behavior tree AI for Godot Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwes/Gut
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwes/Gut
Language: gdscript
Godot Unit Test. Unit testing tool for Godot Game Engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: viniciusgerevini/godot-aseprite-wizard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/viniciusgerevini/godot-aseprite-wizard
Language: gdscript
Godot Editor plugin to help import Aseprite animations to AnimationPlayers, AnimatedSprites and SpriteFrames.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youichi-uda/godot-mcp-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youichi-uda/godot-mcp-pro
Language: gdscript
162 MCP tools for AI-powered Godot 4 development. Scene, animation, 3D, physics, particles, audio, shader, input simulation, runtime analysis, navigation, testing & more. $5 one-time.
